summary: Tested Grade Level and Subject features in Adaptive Learning and Games Creator. All requested features are implemented and working correctly.

issues: Grade Level badge shows only emoji, not the full text like '3rd-5th Grade'. Consider adding text label for clarity.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Grade Level and Subject features fully tested. All dropdowns working with correct options.

adaptive_learning.grade_level_selector: PASS - Dropdown with K-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-12 options (Spanish: Kínder-2do, 3ro-5to, 6to-8vo, 9no-12vo)
adaptive_learning.subject_selector: PASS - Math, Language Arts, Science, Reading options

games_creator.subject_selector: PASS - 10 subjects: Matemáticas, Inglés/Lenguaje, Ciencias, Estudios Sociales, Historia, Geografía, Arte, Música, Educación Física, Otro
games_creator.grade_level_selector: PASS - Replaced Difficulty with Grade Level (K-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-12)
games_creator.difficulty_removed: PASS - Difficulty dropdown no longer present
games_creator.game_save_with_fields: PASS - POST /api/games/save stores grade_level and subject
games_creator.games_list_includes_fields: PASS - GET /api/games returns grade_level and subject for each game

library_view.subject_badge: PASS - Subject shown as emoji badge and text badge on game cards
library_view.grade_level_badge: PASS - Grade Level shown as emoji badge on game cards

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/games/generate - accepts grade_level and subject parameters
POST /api/games/save - stores grade_level and subject fields
GET /api/games - returns grade_level and subject for saved games

adaptive_learning_page: Nivel de Grado (Grade Level) dropdown with 4 options
games_creator_page: Nivel de Grado (Grade Level) dropdown with 4 options (replaced Difficulty)
my_games_tab: Subject emoji badge on game cards
Grade Level emoji badge on game cards
Subject name text badge on game cards
